rationale: Talent tree was the biggest meta-progression gap. ArbreDeVie scene was a ghost feature (4 scripts, 1000+ lines, but .tscn was 12-line stub that crashed). After fixing the scene, discovered that 12 of 16 talent special rules had NO gameplay effect — players spent Anam on talents that did nothing. Wired 9 unwired rules across 4 core gameplay files. Combined with 4 already-wired Anam reward talents, 13/16 special rules now work.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C29: verify ArbreDeVie scene loads without crash, confirm talent effects apply correctly (survive_death at 0 HP, passive_heal every 5 cards, resist_damage blocks once). 3 remaining unwired talents: predict_next_theme, see_next_card_full, sacrifice_life_for_anam — these need HUD UI work. Feature candidates: BiomeWalkConfig .tres resources for 7 non-Broceliande biomes, or MOS convergence HUD display.
